transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Paul! Sam from Cool Air Services. We're scheduling HVAC maintenance visits. Would you be interested in getting your system serviced?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: That seems expensive. I saw a competitor advertising $55 for the same thing.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's our standard rate for a comprehensive visit.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Is there anything you can do on the price?
